infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app requires camera access to capture photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app requires microphone access to record audio and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app requires photo library access to save and retrieve media files.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app requires permission to save photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app requires location access to provide location-based features.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app requires location access to provide location-based features even when in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app requires location access to provide location-based features.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: This app requires calendar access to create and manage reminders.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: This app requires access to reminders to create and manage tasks.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: This app requires motion and fitness tracking access to use the accelerometer and gyroscope.

plugins.microphonePermission: This app requires microphone access to record audio and videos.
